remember: Recall the structure and key components of an article
Identify the purpose and tone of different types of articles
List the essential features of effective article writing
understand: Understand the importance of audience and context in article writing
Analyze the role of language, tone, and style in conveying the author's message
Recognize the significance of persuasive techniques in article writing
apply: Apply the principles of effective article writing to create engaging content
Use language and tone to convey a specific message to the target audience
Utilize persuasive techniques to persuade the readers
analyze: Analyze the effectiveness of different article writing techniques
Evaluate the impact of article writing on the target audience
Critique the use of language, tone, and style in article writing

ncert_objectives: To understand the importance of article writing as a means of communication.
To learn the various techniques of article writing, including the use of language, tone, and style.
To develop the skills of writing effective articles that engage and persuade the readers.
board_exam_objectives: To assess the student's understanding of the structure and key components of an article.
To evaluate the student's ability to identify and analyze the purpose and tone of different types of articles.
To test the student's skills in writing effective articles that convey a specific message to the target audience.
